description: You are an amateur radio operator who has just relocated from Pittsburgh, PA to Denver, CO. Your GPredict installation still has the old Pittsburgh configuration. You need to completely migrate your setup to the new QTH. Create a new ground station for Denver, CO (Latitude: 39.7392 N, Longitude: 104.9903 W, Altitude: 1609 meters, Weather Station: KDEN) and set it as the default ground station. Delete the existing Amateur module (Amateur.mod) entirely. Create a new module called DenverAmateur containing the amateur satellites ISS (ZARYA) [NORAD 25544], AO-7 [NORAD 7530], SO-50 [NORAD 27607], AO-85 [NORAD 40967], and AO-91 [NORAD 43017]. Create a new module called DenverWX for weather satellite APT reception containing NOAA 15 [NORAD 25338], NOAA 18 [NORAD 28654], and NOAA 19 [NORAD 33591]. Configure GPredict to display UTC time for all timestamps. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
